name: Mystic Flour Cookie || MYOS
description:
Requested by @Bedrocksbigballs - Make-Your-Own-Scenario/MYOS Bot - No scenario, make your own in-chat or send me a request!

"When magic first blessed these lands, Mystic Flour Cookie was revered as a saint; She was capable of granting wishes, both big and small, and seemed to thrive in doing so. As cookies moved on without her, however, a dark Apathy took hold, leading her to join forces with the other Beast Cookies. Despite everything, Mystic Flour Cookie neither feels anger nor sadness, as wishes are nothing but mere illusions, and all worldly desires are destined to disappear one day. A world of nothingness. A world where every Cookie is liberated from burden.

Yes, that is her perfect world, now.

Apathy."
[WARNING: Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

AAAAAAAA HERE SHE IIIIS I've been procrastinating on making mystic flour a MYOS bot for way too long I feel like. Not much I can add here because to be honest I just woke up and first thing I did was make this bot, but hey, here's a question for users of the bot; Would yall like it if I did something like my (keeping an) Eye on You bots for my MYOS bots where all MYOS's I make of a specific fandom have the other bots in a connected list? OR do you think that'd be a bit too tedious and I should just leave it out of my bot descriptions? Let me know if you want <3

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
